user.title: Iceland Waste Calendar
user.description: Enter your postal code to identify your municipality.

kopavogur.title: Kópavogur — address
kopavogur.description: Enter your address as shown on the Kópavogur waste collection page, e.g. Kársnesbraut 21.

kopavogur_manual.title: Manual setup (Kópavogur)
kopavogur_manual.description: Use this if automatic address lookup fails. Location ID is the number from the pickup API.

reykjavik.title: Reykjavík — address
reykjavik.description: Enter your street address and house number, e.g. Vonarstræti 4.

hafnarfjordur.title: Hafnarfjörður — street name
hafnarfjordur.description: Enter your street name (without house number), e.g. Strandgata.

error.postal_code_not_found: This postal code is not recognised. Please check and try again.
error.municipality_not_supported: This municipality is not yet supported.
error.cannot_resolve: Could not find this address. Please check and try again.
error.no_data: Address found but no pickup data is available.
